creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
Due to a confusion with devel/p5-Readonly port, I submitted a diff with
incorrect dependency. Please discard the earlier diff, and refer to the
attached diff instead.

The PRs on which this PR depends are also changed. Following are the updated
list:

* ports/146973 -- new port: textproc/p5-PPIx-Regexp
* ports/146974 -- new port: textproc/p5-POD2-Base
* ports/146999 -- update port: devel/p5-Readonly

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA

Sent via Gnus from GNU Emacs
